SECTION 1: IDENTIFICATION
Product Name: Generic Acetone, Technical Grade
Manufacturer: Example Chemical Supply Co.
Revision Date: 2026-01-15
Recommended Use: Laboratory solvent

SECTION 2: HAZARDS IDENTIFICATION
Highly flammable liquid and vapor. Causes serious eye irritation.

SECTION 3: COMPOSITION/INFORMATION ON INGREDIENTS
Chemical Name          CAS Number      Concentration
Acetone                 67-64-1         95-100%
Water                   7732-18-5       0-5%

SECTION 4: FIRST AID MEASURES
If in eyes, rinse cautiously with water.

SECTION 8: EXPOSURE CONTROLS/PERSONAL PROTECTION
Use in a well-ventilated area. Wear chemical splash goggles.

SECTION 11: TOXICOLOGICAL INFORMATION
No additional toxicological data available beyond standard classifications.

SECTION 15: REGULATORY INFORMATION
This product is not known to contain any substance subject to a
Proposition 65 warning requirement at this time.
